goal: Add a strict verifier for externally produced real-adapter CUDA evidence bundles so results generated on a CUDA host can be checked before they are used for M6-RC/v0 release closeout. The verifier must require live no-fake endpoint JSON, GO adapter intake, GO RC gate runner output, GO M6 verification, and GO v0 readiness when validating a release bundle. Current local artifacts must remain NOT_GO because the real trained adapter endpoint evidence is absent.
head: 77855d3
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, or v0 release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add an external evidence bundle verifier script/tests/current verification evidence and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Verifier accepts a complete strict live CUDA evidence bundle in tests
Verifier rejects self-test or fake/markdown-only endpoint evidence in tests
Verifier cross-checks adapter hashes across intake and endpoint evidence
Current local bundle verification remains NOT_GO
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate adds external evidence verification tooling only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped external real-adapter evidence bundle verifier gate after confirming the remaining final-program blocker requires CUDA-host evidence and current tooling can generate that evidence but lacks a single strict bundle-level acceptance check.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, v0 readiness audit, M6 verifier, endpoint capture script/tests, and RC gate runner/tests. Current artifacts still lack live no-fake endpoint evidence, GO adapter intake, GO RC gate output, GO M6 verification, and GO v0 readiness.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/verify_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py, focused tests, and current bundle verification JSON. The verifier requires live_docker_capture endpoint JSON/markdown, GO adapter intake, matching adapter hashes, GO RC gate runner, GO M6 verification, and GO v0 readiness.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused bundle verifier pytest, current bundle verification expected NOT_GO, generated bundle verification JSON validation, v0 release readiness expected NOT_GO, readiness JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: External CUDA evidence bundle verifier is complete. Current local bundle remains NOT_GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE and v0 remains NOT_GO because real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence is still absent.

pabcd.approved_scope: Real adapter evidence bundle verifier script/tests/evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim from current local artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
